TopLevelControl.name: FarmingPartyPlusListWindow
TopLevelControl.OnUpdate: local w, h = self:GetDimensions() if ((self.currentWidth ~= w) or (self.currentHeight ~= h)) then self.currentWidth = w self.currentHeight = h end

Control.name: FarmingPartyPlusItemColumn
Control.OnInitialized: self.GetText = function(control) return control:GetNamedChild("Link"):GetText() end self.SetText = function(control, text) control:GetNamedChild("Link"):SetText(text) end
Control.OnMouseEnter: if(string.len(self:GetText()) > 0 and zo_plainstrfind(self:GetText(), "|H") == 1) then InitializeTooltip(ItemTooltip, self) ItemTooltip:SetLink(self:GetText()) end
Control.OnMouseExit: if(string.len(self:GetText()) > 0 and zo_plainstrfind(self:GetText(), "|H") == 1) then ClearTooltip(ItemTooltip) end
Control.OnMouseUp: if upInside and zo_plainstrfind(self:GetText(), "|H") == 1 then ZO_LinkHandler_OnLinkClicked(self:GetText(), button, self) end
